advert.description: The first advertisement in the break features a woman relaxing in a lounge chair; the text 'willowbrook' is visible in the lower third.
The second advertisement showcases various interior settings (kitchen, dining room, bedroom); the text 'Oak Furnitureland' and 'SAVE ON EVERY RANGE' is displayed on screen.
A promotional campaign for the Age UK lottery featuring people on beaches and gardening; the 'Age uk' logo and phone number '0800 304 7502' are prominently displayed.
The fourth advertisement is for a mattress brand 'Emma', showing a man sleeping soundly and text 'EASTER SALE NOW ON'; the ad concludes before the show returns at 03:23.
